title: APM Pipeline
description: Declarative pipeline definition for APM Orchestrator

name.description: Unique pipeline name (kebab-case, matches filename without .yml)

event.description: GitHub event type in dot-notation, e.g. issues.opened, pull_request.opened, issue_comment.created, workflow_run.completed

labels.description: All listed labels must be present on the issue/PR for the rule to match

agent.description: Agent slug matching the agent definition filename (without .md)

condition.description: Optional JS-expression evaluated against the current event context. Step is skipped when falsy.

approval.description: Set to 'required' to insert a human-in-the-loop gate before this step

approval_timeout_hours.description: Hours before an unresolved approval gate times out (default 72)
